privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real forensic test data downloaded from the DFTT project (NTFS File Recovery Test Image). All required target names and paths (case name 'Targeted_Triage_2024', case number 'INV-TRG-001', set name 'Config_And_Logs', extensions 'txt', 'log', 'xml', and output file paths) explicitly match the task description instructions, setup scripts, and export verification checks.
